name: zsnd_backend_init_directsound
description: zSndBackend_InitDirectSound initializes or reports the host DirectSound provider boundary.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /MD /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for _zSndBackend_InitDirectSound at 0x4a1e50 still fails: 152 unmasked mismatches, 68 relocation bytes masked, 6 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 232 bytes, VC object symbol size 240 bytes.

Functional coverage is provider-boundary limited: the smoke reaches the real DirectSound provider path and accepts either the host's expected DirectSound failure or a successful primary-buffer setup with cleanup. It cannot require audio hardware or driver availability on every development machine.
